user.title: Trakt Scrobbler Configuration
user.description:
To configure Trakt Scrobbler, you need to create an app on Trakt:

1. Go to {trakt_app_url}
2. Create a new app
3. Set the redirect URI to: `urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob`
4. Copy your Client ID and Client Secret

device.title: Activate Device
device.description:
To complete setup:

1. Visit: **{verification_url}**
2. Enter code: **{user_code}**
3. Click Submit below after authorizing

data.name: Integration Name
data.check_entity: Only scrobble when these entities allow it

plex_ask.title: Connect Plex (optional)
plex_ask.description: Plex is optional. Connect it to fetch richer metadata and to enable importing your Plex watch history into Trakt.

plex_pin.title: Authorize Plex
plex_pin.description:
1. Open this link in your browser: **{auth_url}**
2. Sign in and authorize the app
3. Click Submit below

import_ask.title: Import Plex history now?
import_ask.description: Optionally backfill your Trakt history from Plex right after setup. Leave the start date empty to import all available history, or set it (for example your TV Time import date) to only import from then on.

data.import_on_setup: Import my Plex watch history into Trakt now

error.device_code_failed: Failed to get device code from Trakt
error.token_poll_failed: Failed to get access token. Please try again.
error.plex_not_authorized: The Plex PIN has not been authorized yet. Authorize it in your browser, then click Submit.

abort.token_poll_failed: Could not get access token from Trakt
abort.plex_pin_failed: Could not create a Plex PIN. Please try again.
